row_fields.att: ATT/SQTT body attribution metrics; explicitly not timing authority
row_fields.llama: comparable llama launch/activation/throughput row when available
row_fields.programs: HCQ program rows classified as main_mmvq/reduce/glue/other
row_fields.role: semantic role bucket such as attn_q/o, ffn_gate/up, ffn_down, lm_head
row_fields.timing: role-local or model-level timing, with method and trust label
